knownDifferences: AssistantEngineer uses engineering formulas and simplified balance models.
EnergyPlus uses its own zone heat-balance algorithms and timestep handling.
Exact watt-by-watt equivalence is not expected.
tolerancePolicy: Tolerance-based comparison; no exact EnergyPlus comparison workflow claim.
requiredNonClaims: Does not claim exact EnergyPlus numerical equivalence.
Does not claim ASHRAE 140 / BESTEST-style validation anchor coverage.
Does not claim full ISO 52016 node/matrix solver equivalence.
